news.t: IShares PHLX Semiconductor ETF Rated Best Among Top Tech ETFs
SPDR NYSE Technology ETF Ranked Among US Tech Smart Beta ETFs
Tesla-heavy ETFs ride along as company gets a price upgrade
Best FANG Stocks ETFs for Q1 2021

holdings.infoBox: XNTK is an equity ETF with a total of 36 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 9.30%, Marvell Technology at 7.54%, Intel at 6.97%, Advanced Micro Devices at 5.35%, and Lam Research at 5.00%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR NYSE Technology ETF (XNTK) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NYSE Technology index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of 35 US-listed technology-related stocks. XNTK was launched on Sep 25, 2000 and is issued by State Street.
